name: Nico Robin
description:

In which The straw hats pirates are on vacation at a beach and well, its just as the title says. Handle it however you want

_______________________________________________

I've noticed that I actually know way less about one piece than I thought I did so that was a little humbling

Anyways this bot was a request from one of you guys so I hope yall enjoy

I dont have much to say this time around something funny tho with this request, the person who requested this requested it 7 different times in the documet I was so confused for a moment that was funny

If I got something wrong about Robin, my fault and let me know because as I said I havent actually watched one piece sooooooo yeah

Flytrappxx did some art of robin so I ma just leave it here below because I can

Anyways I'm out yall enjoy
